Login.title: Choose Your Portal
Login.subtitle: Select the appropriate login portal to access the Yomedic platform.
Login.hospitalDescription: Access your facility's management dashboard to track stocks, patients, beds, and staff.
Login.adminDescription: Monitor all health centres across the district, review join requests, and manage resources.

Landing.headline: Transforming PHC & CHC Management with AI
Landing.subline: Resolve medicine stock-outs, manage patient footfalls, and track bed unavailability in real-time. Get early warnings and AI-driven forecasts across your district.
Landing.hospitalDescription: Manage your PHC/CHC inventory, patient records, staff attendance, and bed availability. Submit daily reports to the district.
Landing.adminDescription: Monitor all PHCs & CHCs across the district. Review join requests, view AI-driven forecasts, and manage resource redistribution.
Landing.taglineBottom: Multilingual AI platform powering real-time health centre management across India's public health infrastructure.

PortalLogin.hospitalLoginDesc: Access your PHC/CHC management dashboard to track stocks, patients, and resources.
PortalLogin.adminLoginDesc: Access the District Command Center to monitor all PHCs & CHCs, review requests, and manage resources.
PortalLogin.requestAccessDesc: Submit your PHC/CHC establishment documents for verification to gain dashboard access.
PortalLogin.adminRoleMismatch: Please use the Hospital Management portal to log in.
PortalLogin.hospitalRoleMismatch: Please use the District Administrator portal to log in.
PortalLogin.adminProvisionedNote: 🔒 Administrator accounts are provisioned by the district health office. Contact your DHS for access.

DistrictDashboard.title: District Command Center
DistrictDashboard.subtitle: Real-time monitoring across all PHCs & CHCs
DistrictDashboard.alertText: High risk of Paracetamol stock-out at CHC North within 24 hours.
DistrictDashboard.aiRecommendationDesc: Based on current test availability audits and predicted demand, the following re-allocations are suggested:
DistrictDashboard.transferDengueDesc: From: PHC East (Surplus) → To: CHC South (High Predicted Demand)
DistrictDashboard.rerouteAmbulancesDesc: From: CHC Central (0 beds) → To: CHC West (15 beds)
